findings.summary: No fiducials on B.Cu (1 SMD components) (finest pad dim 3.18mm — coarse pitch only)
findings.description: B.Cu has 0 fiducial(s) but 1 SMD components. Assembly machines need >= 3 fiducials for accurate placement.
findings.recommendation: Add fiducial markers for pick-and-place alignment (3 per side with SMD).
